claims.check: The checkpoint hash matches its worker finish record
evidence: Checkpoint bytes match the hash recorded by dkr-p3-allocation.

claims.check: Runtime, sampler, workload, observation count, scripts, and acceptance gates were frozen before observation
claims.threshold: predeclared.json and both script hashes exist before raw.json; zero maximum=0; one observation per 0x, 1x, and 2x control
claims.value: predeclared mtime=2026-07-16T05:00:35Z; raw mtime=2026-07-16T05:00:49Z; declaredAt=2026-07-16T05:00:00Z; thresholds and script hashes matched
claims.replay: Read predeclared.json and compare its timestamp, thresholds, observationCountPerControl, and scriptSha256 values with file metadata and sha256sum output
evidence: Node v26.4.0; sampling interval=1; iterations=256; units=[0,1,2].
zeroAttributedBytesMax=0; oneBytesPerIteration=768..1408; signalToNoiseMin=64; twoToOneRatio=1.8..2.2.
observationCountPerControl=1; observe.mjs and check-replay.mjs hashes equal the predeclared hashes.
The predeclaration and scripts predate raw.json.

claims.check: The preserved observation has one result for each frozen control and is not replaced by a favorable repeat
claims.threshold: Exactly one 0x, one 1x, and one 2x result; one raw artifact; failed result preserved
claims.value: controls=[0x,1x,2x] exactly once; raw hash=73a837b771dfd7c572c3ac6f8d015051ec463a60c0149606dbdb6962c08154e6; failed result preserved
claims.replay: Read observe.mjs control loop and raw.json controls; compare raw.json hash with replay.json observationSha256
evidence: observe.mjs invokes observe once for each unit in config.control.units.
raw.json contains exactly three controls: 0x=168, 1x=278632, 2x=557160.
replay.json pins the preserved raw artifact hash and records accepted=false.

claims.check: The saved checker reproduces the raw 168, 278632, and 557160 byte arithmetic
claims.threshold: Subtract zero, divide by 256, and compare the 2x/1x signal without post-observation threshold changes
claims.value: oneSignal=278464; twoSignal=556992; onePerIteration=1087.75; twoPerIteration=2175.75; signalToNoise=1087.75; ratio=2.0002298322224776
evidence: zeroAttributedBytes=168; oneAttributedBytes=278632; twoAttributedBytes=557160.
oneSignalBytes=278464; twoSignalBytes=556992.
oneBytesPerIteration=1087.75; twoBytesPerIteration=2175.75; signalToNoise=1087.75; twoToOneRatio=2.0002298322224776.

claims.check: The frozen exact-zero noise gate rejects the allocation method
claims.threshold: zeroAttributedBytes <= 0 and every checker gate true
claims.source_of_truth: /tmp/dkr-p3-allocation/predeclared.json, raw.json, check-replay.mjs, and the one-shot validator replay
evidence: The deterministic replay emitted accepted=false and zeroNoise=false.
All other replay gates emitted true.
The checker sets exit code 1 when accepted is false; the replay exited 1.

claims.check: The checkpoint remains within its 30 minute freshness window
claims.replay: Read observed_at and max_age and compare with date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ
evidence: checkpoint observed_at=2026-07-16T05:00:49.828Z
validator observed_at=2026-07-16T05:06:53Z
max_age=30m

claims.check: Only reducing discovery may advance; allocation measurement implementation and optimization remain blocked
claims.threshold: Rejected method retained; no allocation regression claim; implementation and optimization blocked
claims.value: Rejected method independently reproduced; reducing discovery accepted; allocation regression case remains unreadable; implementation and optimization blocked
claims.source_of_truth: The one-shot replay and checkpoint wall_gate
claims.replay: Compare the replay rejection with checkpoint questions_unanswered, active_wall_readings, and wall_gate
evidence: The exact-zero gate failed at 168 > 0.
No product allocation regression value can be derived from the rejected calibration.
Only a separately funded narrower leaf-attribution DKR can proceed.

wall_gate.reason: The predeclared exact-zero gate rejected the method at 168 attributed bytes; no allocation regression value exists.
